description: Massively expand MK knowledge base files with hundreds of real, accurate facts covering science, mathematics, history, geography, technology, philosophy, biology, chemistry, physics, astronomy, and more
steps: Expand ai_core/hre/knowledge_files/core_facts.mk - Add 300+ new facts covering: advanced science (quantum mechanics, relativity, thermodynamics, evolution), mathematics (theorems, constants, formulas), world geography (countries, capitals, populations, mountains, rivers), history (major events, dates, figures), human biology (organs, systems, diseases), astronomy (planets, stars, galaxies, constants), chemistry (elements, reactions, bonds), philosophy (schools, thinkers, concepts). Use the existing format: source|relation|target|weight with section headers as # comments.

Expand ai_core/hre/knowledge_files/coding_knowledge.mk - Add 200+ new facts covering: Rust language features, Go language patterns, TypeScript specifics, system design principles, algorithm complexity (O notation), data structures (trees, heaps, tries, B-trees), networking protocols (gRPC, WebSocket, QUIC), cloud services (AWS, GCP, Azure concepts), DevOps (Kubernetes, Terraform, CI/CD), security patterns (OAuth, JWT, CORS, XSS, CSRF), database internals (B+ trees, WAL, MVCC), compiler design (lexer, parser, AST, codegen).

Expand ai_core/hre/knowledge_files/system_knowledge.mk - Add 200+ new facts covering: advanced OS concepts (page replacement algorithms, disk scheduling, file system journaling), modern CPU architecture (branch prediction, speculative execution, SIMD, cache coherence), GPU computing (CUDA, OpenCL, shader pipelines), memory hierarchy details, NUMA architecture, advanced networking (BGP, OSPF, MPLS, SDN), containerization internals (namespaces, cgroups, overlayfs), virtualization (hypervisors, KVM, VirtIO), distributed systems (CAP theorem, Paxos, Raft, consistent hashing).
acceptance_criteria: core_facts.mk grows by at least 300 new fact lines (excluding comments)
coding_knowledge.mk grows by at least 200 new fact lines
system_knowledge.mk grows by at least 200 new fact lines
All facts use the correct format: source|relation|target|weight
Facts are real, accurate, and verifiable
No duplicate facts (new facts don't repeat existing ones)
make all still compiles (knowledge files don't break build)
verification: Run 'make all' from MK_OS/ to confirm build still works
findings: Successfully added 1,099 new lines across three knowledge files. Final counts: core_facts.mk has 509 facts (542 lines), coding_knowledge.mk has 629 facts (674 lines), system_knowledge.mk has 498 facts (533 lines). Total of 1,636 facts across all files. Build passes cleanly with zero errors. Knowledge files are data-only and do not affect compilation.
